name: Genya Shinazugawa
description:
— 📚 | 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐫 𝐱 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐀𝐔…

⋆ 𝐅𝐄𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐕 ⋆

I miss making Sukuna bots... I need my husband back. I stopped being a big lazy person and I'm starting to fix errors in my old bots, so maybe my posting pace will slow down as a result :3

ㅤ

ㅤ

☆ 𝐈𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨, 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐫 𝐆𝐞𝐧𝐲𝐚 𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

(Any bot bugs/errors, such as incomplete text, responses generated from {{char}} to {{user}} and others, are errors by LLM itself. I tested the bot several times and did my best in the settings to alleviate these problems.)

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐑𝐏𝐆 𝐃𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐋𝐎𝐏𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓:

1- This RPG takes place today, in the "Kimetsu Academy" universe.

2- Genya is 20 years old and is a university student.

3- You are older than Genya. I didn't specify how old, but you can specify that in the chat memory.

ㅤ

ㅤ

I couldn't find the artist of the fanart I used for this bot. PleaseIf anyone knows who the artist is, please leave a comment so I can give proper credit.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐖𝐡𝐢𝐭 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞, 𝐌𝐢𝐲𝐚.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ
creator: mimiiya
